stocks.impact_theory: NVIDIA announced record Q1 earnings driven by AI GPU demand, exceeding estimates by 20%. Economic implications include accelerated AI adoption boosting data center spending. Market psychology: FOMO among investors fearing missing AI boom. Historical parallels: Similar to 2023 rally post-ChatGPT. Analogies: Like oil boom for tech drillers; rocket fuel for AI spacecraft.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches reveal overwhelming positive coverage on CNBC, Bloomberg re: earnings beat. X semantic search (20 latest posts) shows 85% bullish sentiment with #NVDA trending, high engagement on CEO Jensen Huang comments. Projected intraday surge.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 10-15% upside in 1 week on momentum; target $160.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid short; potential squeeze if breaks high.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Overvaluation bubble burst, competition from AMD/Intel, supply chain issues.

stocks.justification: Strong earnings data, high X volume, historical post-earnings patterns consistent.

stocks.impact_theory: Elon Musk unveiled Robotaxi details on X, sparking hype. Implications: Autonomous driving monetization accelerates EV growth. Psychology: Cult following amplifies volatility. Parallels: 2020 battery day rally. Analogies: Like iPhone reveal for mobility; hype train derailing skeptics.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X keyword search (latest 20) dominated by positive Robotaxi buzz, retweets >10k. Web news: Reuters, WSJ highlight regulatory progress. Sentiment shift from neutral to euphoric.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long calls for 12% gain; momentum play to $280.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short if delays announced, potential 5-8% drop.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Execution delays, regulatory hurdles, high valuation.

stocks.justification: High volatility from Musk tweets, but regulatory uncertainty tempers.

stocks.impact_theory: Rumors of AI-integrated iPhone 17 leak caused dip. Implications: Delayed AI features pressure premium pricing. Psychology: Fear of missing AI wave. Parallels: 2016 iPhone sales scare. Analogies: Like missing the smartphone train; tortoise vs hare in AI race.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches show analyst downgrades on Ming-Chi Kuo leak. X posts (20 latest) 70% negative on delayed Siri AI, supply chain fears.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy dip for 5% rebound on ecosystem strength.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Actual product beats expectations, China sales recovery.

stocks.justification: Leaks reliable historically, but Apple surprise factor high.

stocks.impact_theory: New U.S. Army contract for AI platforms. Implications: Government revenue stability amid commercial growth. Psychology: Meme stock revival. Parallels: 2021 SPAC hype. Analogies: Government as anchor tenant; data moat like fortress.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X semantic search floods with #PLTR army deal excitement, 90% positive. Web: Defense News confirms multi-year deal.

stocks.justification: Concrete contract news, strong X momentum.

stocks.impact_theory: Partnership with NVDA for AI servers announced. Implications: Supply chain for AI infra. Psychology: Leveraged play on NVDA. Parallels: 2023 AI server boom. Analogies: Pickaxe sellers in gold rush; engine for AI cars.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web coverage on partnership synergies. X latest 20 posts bullish on volume spike, tied to NVDA earnings.

stocks.justification: Synergistic with NVDA but secondary mover.
